title: pavonia pleuranthera
intro: Pavonia pleuranthera, also known as Rock Rose or Rose Mallow, is a flowering plant belonging to the family Malvaceae. Traditionally, Pavonia pleuranthera has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal effects, attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pavonia pleuranthera include its potential to treat various skin conditions, such as wounds, eczema, and acne, as well as its anti-cancer and antioxidant properties. Pavonia pleuranthera can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
